title: carex coriacea
intro: Carex coriacea, also known as the rough sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea. Carex coriacea can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
